name: Box Zombies
short_description: 4 players. 1 shared screen. Fight through massive zombie hordes as you explore both randomly generated and handcrafted maps, discover unique weapons and powerups, and build defenses to survive through day & night. Cooperation is essential, but be careful of stray bullets and bouncing grenades!
detailed_description:
Couch Co-op Survival Mayhem

Box Zombies is a chaotic, easy-to-learn, couch co-op survival game where no two rounds are the same. Explore both randomly generated and handcrafted maps, build defenses, and fight off massive zombie hordes with up to 4 players on a single shared screen.

Survive Together

• Team up and stay close! The shared camera encourages players to stick together or risk getting left behind

• Stock up on ammo before the round ends, or hope your favorite weapon spawns in the next round

• Build defenses with sentry guns, barricades, mines, and more

• Play through day/night cycles that shift the pacing and tension

Why Play Box Zombies?

  • Made for Co-Op: Built from the ground up for split-screen co-op gameplay

  • Accessible Controls: Simple, intuitive, and beginner-friendly

  • Fresh Every Time: Randomized maps, loadouts, powerups, and events

  • Great Party Game: Fast-paced rounds, chaotic fun, and easy drop-in play

Easy to Learn — Perfect for Parties

New to gaming? Not a problem. 

Box Zombies uses simple controls designed so anyone, from non-gamers to party guests, can jump in and have fun.

Features

  • Singleplayer & co-op on a shared camera for up to 4 players

  • Both randomly generated and handcrafted maps

  • 20+ Characters to unlock through gameplay challenges

  • 14+ Weapons, explosives, and defenses

  • Day/night cycles

FAQ

Q: What kind of game is this?

A: A survival sandbox with an emphasis on teamwork, exploration, and simple-yet-chaotic fun.

Q: Is there online co-op?


A: Not at this time, Box Zombies is designed specifically for same-screen co-op.

Q: Can I turn blood off?



A: Yes! There’s a blood toggle in the Settings menu.

Q: Is this the same as the mobile game?


A: It shares the name and concept, but this version is almost entirely rewritten to be more stable, polished, and expanded. Stats do not carry over.

A Note from the Developer:

Hey everyone!

Thanks for checking out Box Zombies. This game is a spiritual successor to one I loved as a kid, and building it has been a passion project and a huge learning journey. I love reading feedback, ideas, and bug reports, so please feel free to reach out.

Thanks For Playing!
